title: THE ABANDONED VERSION
body:
- You work for mojang.
- Your job is to take picture of bugs.
- This version is different.
- You can't turn back now.
- Rent is due

This version is being planned to be released, a version that notch left behind, there was something self aware within it, and now it has un-leashed many creatures, your need to capture them in a photo and send them to mojang to patch the error, and you decided to bring your buddie (or more than one)

Horror Mods:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
CANTBREATHE, Cave Dweller Evolved, Error404, From The Fog, In Your World, ITS NOT REAL and Rapture

</details>
